name: Avatar
purpose: Represents a person, workspace, or system actor with a stable, token-driven identity surface.
whenToUse: Use for people, agents, or workspaces when a compact identity marker helps scanning.
Use fallback initials when imagery is missing or unreliable.
whenNotToUse: Do not use decorative avatars for generic status or branding when a Badge or Icon is clearer.
Do not rely on remote images alone without a readable fallback.
accessibilityRequirements: Provide an alt or accessibility label when the avatar conveys identity that matters to the task.
Use decorative mode only when nearby text already conveys the same identity.
